items.title: Formalize page layout convention
items.body:
## Context

The page layout convention has been applied to Publication #0 as a first implementation. This task formalizes the convention as a reusable standard for all publications.

## Convention Rules

1. **Key-value tables** — Always use story-row key-value tables instead of bullet or numbered list style documentation
2. **Section intros** — Each section starts with a small intro text (1-2 sentences) explaining what follows
3. **Section conclusions** — Each section ends with:
   - A conclusio

items.title: Universal layout pagination for exportation and for web pages
items.full_title: TASK: Universal layout pagination for exportation and for web pages
items.body: First task for P6. Define and implement a universal pagination layout that works consistently across export formats (PDF, DOCX) and web pages. #6:task:Universal layout pagination for exportation and for web pages

items.title: PDF export pipeline — print-to-PDF layout, cover page, exclusion list
items.full_title: TASK: PDF export pipeline — print-to-PDF layout, cover page, exclusion list
items.body:
Define and implement the full PDF export pipeline for knowledge publications.

- Cover page (done)
- Exclusion list: video, iframe, webcard, banner (done)
- Reformatting: TOC, images, links (done)
- Image format standard: PNG/JPEG (defined)
- Mermaid diagrams → pre-rendered PNG for DOCX (planned)
- Per-publication review to enforce image format standard
- Test output on Publication #1

items.title: DOCX export pipeline — pandoc, template, cover block, image handling
items.full_title: TASK: DOCX export pipeline — pandoc, template, cover block, image handling
items.body:
Define and implement the DOCX export pipeline for knowledge publications via pandoc.

- Pandoc invocation: markdown source → DOCX
- Reference DOCX template (fonts, margins, styles)
- Cover title block (pandoc metadata mapping)
- Mermaid → pre-rendered PNG before pandoc
- Image handling: absolute paths, PNG/JPEG only
- TOC: pandoc-native TOC (--toc flag)
- Test output on Publication #1

items.title: 7 visual fixes
items.body:
## DOCX Export — Visual Fixes

| # | Fix | Status |
|---|-----|--------|
| 1 | Story table: no header row in right-panel key-value table | ✅ Fixed |
| 2 | Story table: separator line on both key AND value columns | ❌ Not fixed |
| 3 | DOCX inner table cells: no blue (#93c5fd) border from global CSS | ❌ Not fixed |
| 4 | Emoji icon alignment in DOCX | ✅ Fixed |
| 5 | Generate proper `.docx` OOXML format (not legacy `.doc`) | ✅ Fixed — PR #304 |
| 6 | Ghost MSO header/footer content appearing as b

items.title: Export Documentation + Layout Convention QA — 2026-02-24/25 (P6/P8)
items.full_title: TASK: Export Documentation + Layout Convention QA — 2026-02-24/25 (P6/P8)
items.body:
## Export Documentation + Layout Convention QA — 2026-02-24/25

### Summary
Combined 2-day sprint across knowledge-live (dev) and knowledge (prod) repos covering:
- **3 convention layouts formalized**: publication.html, default.html, three-zone @page model
- **PDF export pipeline**: single header liner, language bar, footer links, filename sanitization
- **DOCX export pipeline**: OOXML ZIP from scratch via altChunk, running header/footer, 8 major fixes
- **Dev→Prod promotion**: knowledge-live la

items.title: 3 convention layouts — publication.html / default.html / three-zone @page
items.full_title: DOC: 3 convention layouts — publication.html / default.html / three-zone @page
items.body: Formalize the 3 layout conventions with scope boundaries. publication.html = full export stack. default.html = no export. three-zone @page = CSS Paged Media header/content/footer.

items.title: Dev→Prod layout promotion — knowledge-live to knowledge core
items.full_title: TASK: Dev→Prod layout promotion — knowledge-live to knowledge core
items.body: Track the promotion of layout features from knowledge-live (dev/pre-prod) to knowledge (prod) via harvest issues #267, #268, #271.

items.title: PDF export methodology — CSS Paged Media, single header liner, position:fixed links
items.full_title: DOC: PDF export methodology — CSS Paged Media, single header liner, position:fixed links
items.body: Document PDF export stack: @page rules, @top-left width:100% for single liner, position:fixed for clickable footer links, filename sanitization, smart TOC page break.

items.title: DOCX export methodology — OOXML ZIP via altChunk, MSO element handling
items.full_title: DOC: DOCX export methodology — OOXML ZIP via altChunk, MSO element handling
items.body: Document DOCX export stack: OOXML ZIP from scratch, altChunk HTML embedding, MSO display:none, running header/footer, cover page, page breaks.
